ống tôiốngành phát triển của các đối tượng trong hệ thống này là gì? Các đối tượng chính bao gồm:

- **Sản phẩm (Product)**: Các sản phẩm được bán trong cửa hàng.

- **Giao hàng (Shipping)**: Thông tin vận chuyển đơn hàng.

Các đối tượng này tương tác với nhau như thế nào?
1. **Người dùng** tạo **Giỏ hàng** và thêm **Sản phẩm** vào giỏ.

- **User**: id, name, email, password, role, created_at
- **Product**: id, name, description, price, image, category_id, stock, created_at
- **Order**: id, user_id, total_amount, status, created_at
- **Cart**: id, user_id, created_at
- **Payment**: id, order_id, method, amount, status, created_at
- **Shipping**: id, order_id, address, city, country, postal_code, status, created_at

- **User**: register(), login(), logout(), updateProfile()
- **Product**: addProduct(), updateProduct(), deleteProduct(), getProducts()
- **Order**: createOrder(), updateOrderStatus(), cancelOrder(), getOrders()
- **Cart**: addToCart(), removeFromCart(), updateQuantity(), getCartItems()
- **Payment**: processPayment(), refundPayment()
- **Shipping**: updateShippingStatus(), trackShipping()

-# Contributing to the project

-Thank you for your interest in contributing to the project! This document will guide you through the process.
-
-## How to contribute
-
-### Reporting bugs
-
-If you find a bug, please report it by opening an issue on GitHub. Please include:
-
-- A clear and descriptive title
-- A detailed description of the bug
-- Steps to reproduce the bug
-- Your environment (OS, Python version, etc.)
-- Any relevant screenshots or error messages
-
-### Suggesting features
-
-If you have a feature request, please open an issue on GitHub. Please include:
-
-- A clear and descriptive title
-- A detailed description of the feature
-- Why this feature would be useful
-- Any mockups or examples if applicable
-
-### Contributing code
-
-If you would like to contribute code:
-
-1. Fork the repository
-2. Create a feature branch (`git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`)
-3. Make your changes
-4. Run the tests to ensure they pass
-5. Commit your changes (`git commit -m 'Add amazing feature'`)
-6. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/amazing-feature`)
-7. Open a Pull Request
-
-## Code style
-
-We use:
-- [Black](https://github.com/psf/black) for code formatting
-- [Flake8](https://flake8.pyc.se/) for linting

-
-Please ensure your code follows these style guidelines before submitting a PR.
-

-

-
-```
-type(scope): description
-
-[optional body]
-```
-
-Where type can be: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `style`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`.
-
-## Pull request process
-
-1. Ensure all tests pass
-2. Update documentation for any changes
-3. You may merge the Pull Request once you have the sign-off of one other developer, or ask for changes if needed
-
-## License
-
